title: Truck overturned on N2 outside Albertinia
description: Update: Traffic flow is back to normal....
bodyText:
Breaking News

Update: Traffic flow is back to normal. 09:32

Update: Stop and go is now in place. 09:10

GARDEN ROUTE NEWS - A truck carrying gas bottles has overturned on the N2 in the Hessequa region, just outside Albertinia, in the direction of Riversdale.

The roadway is currently closed to all traffic while emergency response teams work to clear the scene. The driver and passenger did not sustain injuries during the accident.


> The scene is being managed by Hessequa Fire and Provincial traffic who are coordinating efforts to safely remove the truck and reopen the road as soon as possible.


Exercise caution when travelling nearby.

Should you encounter an emergency or require assistance, contact the GRDM Emergency Call Centre at 044 805 5071 or send a WhatsApp to 081 709 5193.

Photos: Supplied

‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’
